mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO similar_spec_pair (task_id, spec_a_id, spec_b_id, overall_score, vector_score, title_score, tags_score, keywords_score, reason_tags) VALUES
(#{p.taskId}, #{p.specAId}, #{p.specBId}, #{p.overallScore}, #{p.vectorScore}, #{p.titleScore}, #{p.tagsScore}, #{p.keywordsScore}, #{p.reasonTags})

sql.if: AND (sa.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{specTitle}, '%') OR sb.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{specTitle}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT ssp.id, ssp.spec_a_id, ssp.spec_b_id, ssp.overall_score, ssp.vector_score, ssp.title_score, ssp.tags_score, ssp.keywords_score, ssp.reason_tags, sa.title AS spec_a_title, sa.tags AS spec_a_tags, sa.status AS spec_a_status, sa.category_id AS spec_a_category_id, ca.name AS spec_a_category_name, sb.title AS spec_b_title, sb.tags AS spec_b_tags, sb.status AS spec_b_status, sb.category_id AS spec_b_category_id, cb.name AS spec_b_category_name FROM similar_spec_pair ssp JOIN steering sa ON sa.id = ssp.spec_a_id JOIN steering sb ON sb.id = ssp.spec_b_id LEFT JOIN steering_category ca ON ca.id = sa.category_id LEFT JOIN steering_category cb ON cb.id = sb.category_id WHERE ssp.task_id = #{taskId}
ORDER BY ssp.overall_score DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM similar_spec_pair ssp JOIN steering sa ON sa.id = ssp.spec_a_id JOIN steering sb ON sb.id = ssp.spec_b_id WHERE ssp.task_id = #{taskId}
